entity: 2012 NBA Draft #1 overall pick: Anthony Davis (NOH; future 2020 NBA champion and 2024-25 MVP with the Lakers)
notes: Anthony Davis was the #1 pick out of Kentucky (John Calipari's first national title team that year). NOH is the era-matched abbreviation for the 2012 New Orleans Hornets (the franchise rebranded to Pelicans in 2013-14).
